case_title: JAMES M BRIGHTMAN VS. CUONG MAHN TRAN

DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER---DERCK LUU. IF THERE ARE ANY FUTURE COURT HEARING, DEFENDANT WILL BRING HIS OWN VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT, ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIGHTMAN, JAMES M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, CUONG MAHN DBA TOM'S HARDWOOD FLOORS $5,280.00 PRINCIPAL, $114.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,394.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TRAN, CUONG MAHN DBA TOM'S HARDWOOD FLOORS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BRIGHTMAN, JAMES M STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

JUDGMENT DEBTORS DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUGDMENT - GRANTED
